series_metadata.series_title: Data Processing Disaster Preparedness and Recovery Plans
series_metadata.series_description: The Data Processing Disaster Preparedness and Recovery Plans are records related to the protection and reestablishment of data processing services, equipment and data (back-up files) in case of a disaster. The Data Processing Disaster Preparedness and Recovery Plans are stored offsite.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Review twice a year in May and October when disaster recovery testing is performed, revise as needed and return offsite storage at Fireproof. superseded by revised plan, and ; Electronic: Review twice a year in May and October when disaster recovery testing is performed, revise as needed and return offsite storage at Fireproof. superseded by revised plan, and
